name: Elicio Therapeutics, Inc.
business: Elicio Therapeutics is a clinical-stage biotechnology company developing novel immunotherapies for cancer, including mKRAS-positive pancreatic cancer, colorectal cancer, lung cancer, and other mKRAS-positive cancers. Its lead product candidate, ELI-002 7P, is a lymph node targeted cancer immunotherapy currently in a Phase 2 study for mKRAS-driven pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma. The company also has preclinical candidates ELI-007 (for mutant BRAF-driven cancers) and ELI-008 (for mutant TP53-expressing cancers).

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biotechnology company advancing novel immunotherapies for the treatment of cancer, including mKRAS-positive pancreatic cancer, colorectal cancer, lung cancer and other mKRAS positive cancers.
Our lead programs focus on our cancer immunotherapy product candidates, which target biologically validated driver tumor mutations using common and well-characterized neoantigens.

catalysts.event: Final disease-free survival analysis for AMPLIFY-7P Phase 2 trial
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate the final disease-free survival analysis to occur in the first half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Commencement of Phase 1 Investigator-Initiated Trial for neoadjuvant ELI-002 7P
catalysts.sentence: The trial is expected to commence in the first half of 2026.
